ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Son Gohan'. Special Trait is 'Saiyan/Earthling' — Gohan's canonical mixed-heritage trait. Era designation is 'Broly Saga'. Golden Super Saiyan hair and young male figure consistent with Gohan's known design. Verified via card name and Bandai official card database.

trivia_bullets.text: Galactic Battle (BT1) was the inaugural English-language booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released July 28, 2017. With 114 cards (60 Commons, 30 Uncommons, 12 Rares, 8 Super Rares, 4 Special Rares), it established the game's color system, card types, and leader mechanic as the foundational template for all subsequent sets. [PSA CardFacts: 2017 Dragon Ball Super Series 1 Galactic Battle]
sources: PSA CardFacts: 2017 Dragon Ball Z Dragon Ball Super Series 1 Galactic Battle

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-062 is a Green Battle card with Power 10,000, energy cost 2 Green, and the Blocker skill — allowing the player to switch this card to Rest Mode and redirect an attack targeting another of their cards onto Gohan instead. The Special Trait 'Saiyan/Earthling' reflects Gohan's canonical dual heritage as the son of Goku (Saiyan) and Chi-Chi (Earthling). [CoreTCG retailer listing BT1-062; WebSearch card search result]
sources: CoreTCG: Son Gohan Family of Justice BT1-062 listing

trivia_bullets.text: The 'Family of Justice' subtitle and the Broly Saga era designation link this card to the DBS: Broly film continuity, where Gohan (now an adult scholar turned warrior) is framed as a pillar of the Son family legacy. However, the card art depicts a young Super Saiyan Gohan, visually consistent with his Cell Saga teenager form, creating a deliberate layering of past heroism onto a present-era card framing. [WebSearch card search BT1-062; PSA Set Registry article on Galactic Battle]
sources: PSA Set Registry: Collecting 2017 Dragon Ball Super Card Game

related_cards.name: Father-Son Galick Gun
related_cards.note: Parallel family-bond framing across the two Saiyan lineages
